name: Cashisclay
involvement_summary: Cashisclay is a German rapper and YouTuber who collaborated with KuchenTV on the music album 'Dissrespekt' released in 2025. The album, which also featured Twizzy, reached position 62 on the German album charts in its release week. KuchenTV has directly worked with Cashisclay on recording and producing the album, representing a creative partnership beyond his usual content.
key_events: Chart success on German album charts
